fields.helpText: This is the name of the Lab area.  It may be a functional area or an area defined by another set of rules.  Each area may have multiple accession areas.

fields.setOfCodes: CH:CHEM, HEM, TOX, SER, RIA, ETC.;MI:MICROBIOLOGY;EM:ELECTRON MICROSCOPY;SP:SURGICAL PATHOLOGY;CY:CYTOLOGY;AU:AUTOPSY;BB:BLOOD BANK;AD:ADMINISTRATIVE;
fields.helpText: This is a 2 to 3 character abbreviation designating the Lab area (section).
Abbreviation is used on some reports.
These are the names of the various lab sections which may be made up of one or more lab sections.
This is a major section of the laboratory.
